improvements: Reduced memory footprint by loading the main screen background image from LittleFS at runtime instead of compiling it into the firmware binary.
Dynamic holiday image display for Easter and Christmas on the main screen.
Holiday images automatically appear and disappear based on the current date.
LVGL memory allocator routed to PSRAM for reliable large image decoding.
Per-book progress updates during Bible data loading at startup.
fixes: Fixed PNG image decoding failure (alloc error) caused by LVGL 9.x memory configuration.
Fixed red-letter fallback text incorrectly rendering in red.
notes: Holiday images (Christmas and Easter) are loaded from LittleFS and displayed when the date matches.
Set the date via the DateTime settings screen to preview holiday images.

improvements: Initial support for over-the-air firmware updates.
OTA progress displayed on screen during firmware download.
Resolved PSRAM initialization failure in command-line builds.
SDIO stability improvements for reliable chunked OTA over ESP-Hosted.
fixes: Fixed build scripts overriding PSRAM board flags (BOARD_HAS_PSRAM).
Fixed OTA update dialog text overlapping action buttons.
notes: OTA updates can be initiated from General Settings when connected to WiFi.
Firmware downloads resume from the last completed chunk after a power cycle.
